page_content:
Formerly: BMGT780.

BUMO0743 Technology Transfer Commercialization Strategies (3 Credits) Viewing technology as a strategic resource of the firm, students develop an understanding of the processes, risks, and rewards of technology commercialization. Student teams are organized to review and select a technological innovation and then determine its commercial viability in the market place.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program. Credit Only Granted for. BMGT785 or BUMO743.
